{{Infobox concept
| name = Intent
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Intent Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Intent is a fundamental power of focused will possessed by all humans. It is an inescapable force that individuals use subconsciously in their daily lives. When a person uses a tool or object, they perform a process called [[investing]], which involves lending their Intent to that item. This investment reinforces the object's purpose, making it more effective at its intended task; for example, a knife invested with the intent to cut will slice more easily. While most people invest Intent blindly, [[Readers]] have the specialized ability to consciously observe, manipulate, and sense the Intent embedded within physical structures. Through [[Reading]], they can perceive the emotions, backgrounds, or specific goals tied to an object's history. Intent can be layered and complex, containing various depths of meaning similar to human intentions. If a [[Reader]] chooses to [[Awaken]] an object, they can trigger a process where the item gains a rudimentary consciousness and agency related to its original purpose. An [[Awakened object]] can then utilize its stored Intent to accomplish its goals, though it ceases to collect new Intent once awakened. Beyond objects, Intent can be sensed in people or even large crowds, though reading a situation rather than an object carries risks, such as being swept up in the collective will of a mob. Intent can also be used actively to project images, communicate, or even blast things, and it can be distributed globally through certain devices.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Intent is a property carried within the structure of objects, such as wood, copper poles, or doors, which can be improved by lending it to an item over time. This focused purpose can be invested into objects or flowed into materials like wood to issue orders, and it is even used by [[Readers]] as a function for memory storage. While individuals like [[Calder]] and [[Jerri]] can focus their own Intent, others such as [[Naberius Clayborn]] may produce flows of malicious or great Intent. This [[essence]] can be sensed through the air, read from paper to understand a person's emotions and background, or even felt as impressions left on rocks and remains. Ultimately, Intent can manifest in powerful ways, ranging from the ancient, infinite [[essence]] within the [[Heart]] to the absolute authority [[Calder]] exerts when using the [[Emperor's crown]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is something that can be bound into objects like wood or copper poles.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is a concept where lending it to an object over time helps the item perform its job better.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is a property that can be held by doors.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] can focus his [[Intent]] like a scalpel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] can be [[Read]] from objects like paper.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] can be invested into objects.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] uses [[Intent]] to focus on his [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is something [[Calder]] can focus.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Everyone invests objects with their [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alchemical wax used by [[Witnesses]] is sensitive to [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is a focused purpose that can be used in [[Reading]] to improve objects.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is a property of weapons that can be focused through accomplishments.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Weapons can carry horrible [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Memory storage for a [[Reader]] is a function of human [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius]] can produce a flow of great [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|An object used for years can become invested with a measurable amount of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is something [[Readers]] can sense through the air.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart]] seemed to conform itself to [[Naberius]]' [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] can be flowed into objects like wood to give orders.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] uses [[Intent]] to adjust the ship's position.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Desperate [[Intent]] can be saved by an [[Awakened object]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] can be used to read a person's background and emotions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder's Intent]] can bind people with absolute authority when using the [[Emperor's crown]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Water cannot wash away [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is carried in the structure of an object.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] is something that can be [[Read]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart]] possesses an infinite, ancient [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] can focus her [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] has malicious [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Readers]] can feel impressions of an object's [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder's sword]] possesses an ancient and focused [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] can be released and smothered by others.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] reads the flow of hostile [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Intent]] can cling to remains or rocks.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Intent is a property of focused will possessed by all humans and is utilized subconsciously by everyone. This human quality can be invested into various objects, such as spoons or knives, to enhance their reliability and sharpness. Such investment can even be applied to the Bones of the [[Dead Mother]]'s [[Children]], or packed into weapons like spiked chains. For a [[Reader]], Intent is a force that can be sensed and manipulated, though its use can be harmful. While it can manifest as a palpable weight or even appear blinding in [[Shera]]'s blade, Intent is ultimately a force subject to degradation.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] is the power of focused will possessed by all humans.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] is a property possessed by humans.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] is used subconsciously by everyone.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] can be invested into objects to enhance their abilities.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Investing Intent]] can make an object like a knife sharper or more reliable.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Bones of the [[Dead Mother]]'s [[Children]] are invested with power like an object held [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Intent]] in [[Shera]]'s blade is blinding to a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The blade [[Shera]] holds possesses a palpable weight of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] can be packed into weapons like spiked chains.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] is a human quality that can be sensed and manipulated through [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] can be used by a [[Reader]] and can be harmful.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] is a force that can degrade.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Intent]] can be invested in objects like a spoon.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Intent is a powerful force that can leak from weapons, stain objects like an atmospheric presence, and serve as the greatest weapon for a [[Magister]]. While it can be sensed through [[Reading]] or felt when examining an object, attempting to read a situation's Intent carries significant risk. [[Calder]] demonstrates mastery over this power by commanding the [[Lyathatan]], moving his Intent through chains and buildings, and even detecting a hidden wisp of unusual Intent within [[the Emperor]]'s chambers. This force can be magnified by the [[Optasia]], used to tear ropes through intense concentration, or even sensed more clearly if a [[Reader]] blinds themselves. Ultimately, Intent is recognized as a language used by [[Great Elders]] and can even reveal a person's internal state, such as when [[Lucan]]'s Intent indicated he was at peace and ready to die.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] can leak out from a weapon.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Lyathatan]] possesses [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] uses [[Intent]] to command the [[Lyathatan]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] is a power that can be magnified by the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reading]] a situation's [[Intent]] is risky.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] can be sensed through [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Readers]] believe the physical structure of an [[Awakened object]] changes to align with invested Intent.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] is a [[Magister]]'s greatest weapon.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] is an atmospheric presence that can seep into and stain objects.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] can move his [[Intent]] down through chains.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] can let his [[Intent]] drift through buildings.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] detects a strange, hidden wisp of unusual [[Intent]] in [[the Emperor]]'s chambers.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]]'s [[Intent]] suggested he was at peace and ready to die.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] can be used to tear ropes through focus and concentration.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Blinding oneself is believed to help a [[Reader]] sense [[Intent]] more clearly.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] can be felt when attempting to [[Read]] an object.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Intent]] is a language used by [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Intent is a projected power or mental state that can be mustered to manipulate objects, exert physical force, or even raise [[Alagaeus]]'s castle. While it functions as a subtle radiation that [[Readers]] can sense, [[the Emperor]] possesses the unique ability to read Intent within even the flimsiest objects. This versatile force can be used to perceive thoughts, warp [[steel]], break relay connections, or block weapons, though it requires careful control. Practitioners like [[Jorin]] have explored its deep possibilities, and certain individuals such as [[Shera]] can utilize it despite not being [[Readers]]. Beyond its use in creating weapons through investment or casting [[Bastion's Veil]], Intent can be sensed by others like [[Lucan]] and may even be torn from a [[Magister]] by a [[Soulbound]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is the power used to raise [[Alagaeus]]'s castle.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a power that can be mustered or used to manipulate objects.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] can use her [[Intent]] even though she is not a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] can [[Read]] [[Intent]] in even the flimsiest object.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin]] explored the possibilities of [[Intent]] more deeply than anyone except [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a subtle radiation that can be picked up by a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a power that can be used to perceive thoughts.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s knives are dense with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] can read ambient [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is something [[Lucan]] can pick up on.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a power or mental state that must be controlled.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Soulbound]] can tear the [[Intent]] from a [[Magister]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a form of power that can be used to block weapons or lock hands in place.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] can be invested to create weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] can be used to warp [[steel]] and break connections to relays.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a property or power that characters can project.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] is a power that can be felt or sensed.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jyrine]]'s [[Intent]] is faster than the [[Imperial Guards]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s weapon might react to her [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Intent]] can be used to exert physical force.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|There are rumors among [[Consultants]] about what happens to [[Intent]] after death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] casts her [[Intent]] to create [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Intent is a force capable of paralyzing thoughts and can be found within the [[Steward]]'s crown or left behind by the belongings of an [[Emperor]]. Through a process called Investment, an object's performance improves based on the quantity, focus, and strength of reinforcing Intent, which can be magnified by a network of earthbound devices. While plants only store this force when utilized by a person, it can also manifest as an invisible surge to seal doors and windows or pulse within a [[diamond]]. Intent serves as one of the three sources used in the [[Awakening]] process and can connect to a user through a [[Soulbound Vessel]], though its presence in complex machinery is treated as a collection of parts. The strength of one's Intent determines the division of possession, and while it is a measurable force, it remains more easily quantified than the concept of [[Significance]] used in [[Reading]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Steward]]'s crown contains [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s belongings leave behind a weight and intensity of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Intent]] can paralyze thoughts.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Investment is the process where an object performs better based on the strength, focus, and quantity of reinforcing [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Plants only store [[Intent]] if a person uses them for something.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Intent]] is magnified by a network of earthbound devices.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|An invisible surge of [[Intent]] sealed every door and window on [[the Emperor]]'s Stage.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[diamond]] in the [[White Sun medallion]] pulses with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Intent]] is one of the three sources used in the [[Awakening]] process.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Complex machinery interacts with [[Intent]] as a collection of parts rather than a single object.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Soulbound Vessel]] may connect to a user's [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Lyathatan]]'s [[Intent]] is a mix of rage, patience, malice, pragmatism, hunger, and desires.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The division of possession depends on the strength of one's [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Significance]] is a concept in [[Reading]] that is more difficult to quantify than [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Intent is a multi-layered property possessed by objects that can attract [[Readers]] and be sensed through taste or other heightened senses. While it can be invested into items such as battering rams or smoke bombs to accomplish amazing feats, breaking through its bindings requires significant power, a feat [[the Emperor]] achieved against [[Estyr]]. This medium can be radiated and read by certain individuals, such as [[Lucan]] who sensed a weak presence in a black linen bag, or [[Shera]] who uses her own to reach Kelalrac. Although the clash of Intent can cause the air to crackle between powerful figures, it can also serve as a distraction for [[Gardeners]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Breaking through [[Intent]] requires considerable power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] is a medium that can be radiated and read by certain [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] could break the [[binding]] of [[Estyr]]'s [[Intent]] with his own.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] can be bound up in a blade or invested in objects like battering rams.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] can accomplish amazing things given enough time.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] sensed weak [[Intent]] from the black linen bag.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] is something that can be tasted by opening one's senses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] is a property that objects can possess which attracts [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Intent]] has many layers beneath the surface.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The smoke bomb had a lot of [[Intent]] invested into it.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardeners]] are more effective when not distracted by [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The air between the [[Great Elder]] and [[Jorin]] crackled with the clash of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] can reach Kelalrac using her [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"Keep your Intent under control, young woman."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
